slides.title: Welcome to Qadaa
slides.body: A companion to help you make up your missed prayers — step by step, day by day.

slides.title: Log Every Prayer You Make Up
slides.body: Tap +1 on any prayer you made up today, or press "Log Full Day" to record all five at once.

slides.title: Keep Your Streak
slides.body: Every day you log a prayer adds to your streak. The streak keeps you consistent — don't break it!

slides.title: Earn Points & Badges
slides.body: Each prayer = 10 points. A full day = 100 points. Climb the ranks and unlock achievement badges.

tourPrayer.title: Log a Prayer
tourPrayer.desc: Tap +1 for each prayer you made up today. The ring shows your overall progress.

tourFullDay.title: Full Day
tourFullDay.desc: Made up all five prayers today? Tap here to record them all at once.

tourStreak.title: Your Daily Streak
tourStreak.desc: Consecutive days you've logged. Try not to break it!

tourBanner.title: Today's Prayers
tourBanner.desc: Shows how many prayers you've logged today toward your daily goal.

wizard.ageTip: Your age right now. Used only to validate that your puberty age is less than your current age.
wizard.pubertyAgeTip: The age at which you reached puberty and prayer became obligatory for you. Usually between 12–15. Missed prayers are counted from this age onward.
wizard.yearsLabel: How many years did you not pray?
wizard.yearsTip: Enter the number of years you stopped praying. Decimals are allowed (e.g. 2.5 years). Each year is counted as 365 days.
wizard.advancedTip: If your life had multiple phases — e.g. you prayed for a while, then stopped, then resumed — you can break it into separate periods here.
wizard.periodMissedTip: A period when you did not pray. Its days will be added to your total to make up.
wizard.periodRegularTip: A period when you prayed regularly. These days are not counted toward your missed prayers.
wizard.totalMissedTip: The number of days you need to make up, each with 5 prayers.
wizard.step3Subtitle: How many prayers do you want to make up each day?
wizard.paceHint: Your daily goal helps you track whether you're on schedule
wizard.zeroDaysWarning: At least one missed period is required.

dashboard.catchupBehind: You're {{count}} prayers behind your goal — add more today

dua.title: Well Done 🌟
dua.subtitle: You completed today's prayers
dua.text: اللهم تقبّل منا، إنك أنت السميع العليم
dua.subtext: May Allah accept from you and make it a weight in your good deeds

intention.title: Intention
intention.text: نويتُ قضاء ما فاتني من الصلوات لله تعالى

hadiths: "Say: O My servants who have transgressed against themselves, do not despair of the mercy of Allah." (39:53)
"Allah accepts the repentance of His servant as long as the soul has not reached the throat."
"The one who repents from sin is like one who has no sin."
"Allah does not tire until you tire."
"Whoever draws near to Me a hand's span, I draw near to him an arm's length."

stats.title: Your Stats
stats.estimateYears: At this pace you'll finish in ~{{years}} year(s)
stats.estimateNoData: Log 3 days to calculate your estimate

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationDenied: Please allow notifications in browser settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure? All your data will be deleted.
settings.graceDayHint: Miss one day without breaking your streak — once per month

share.title: Sync Data Across Devices
share.qrInstructions: Open the app on your other device → Import → Scan this code
share.qrTooLarge: Data too large for QR, use the Copy tab instead
share.qrScanHint: Works with any QR scanner or phone camera
share.clipboardInstructions: Copy the text and send it to yourself via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Notes
share.clipboardHint: On the other device: open app → Sync → Import → paste here
share.importInstructions: Paste the backup data copied from another device
share.importFailed: Invalid data — make sure you copied it completely

errors.importFailed: Failed to import file. Please check the file is valid.
